feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through the life with yuri in heart

entry.title: Episode 22. Happy Dream for Evermore.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Upon following day of returning from Rapha’s house, Recycling Box spat out the error. It was the second after Lydia put her needless winter clothes into Recycling Box. The Recycling Box being a machine that disintegrating unnecessary items at the molecular level, and completely dispose them of the world. Energy generated whilst disintegration can be stored, up to fixed amount.

entry.title: Episode 21. Sayonara, See You Again.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: From Rapha’s perspective, Mika was an incomprehensible creature. Mika, the Third Tenmoku, creation of Angel Project, held far more intelligence than Rapha, and greatly excelled archaic humans in physical abilities. Researchers were overjoyed with it; only at the beginning however. Before long, they likewise recognised Mika as failure. Albeit Rapha was introduced to Mika as her younger sister, I didn’t feel like we would be getting along at all. Mika has never smiled nor altered her facial expression. Rapha couldn’t even paltry grasp the path of her thoughts. Hence, we instantly grew alienated. Since Rapha had Lucy however, that meant few to me. Thereafter, a few weeks later, I was scared to hear, Mika strangled a researcher. Perhaps, she would have done that to me as well. This estrangement rather positive​, I concluded. I also drew conclusion that the fact Lucy hadn’t hitherto met Mika being positive likewise. Whereas existence of Angel Project itself was concealed, Mika couldn’t judged officially. Due to prohibition for humankind​ to manufacture humans. But withal, people of desire to cross beyond such taboos had break forth into this world. Akin the group that gathered for Angel Project, whilst secretly advancing it. Mika was isolated, yet, strangely enough, no one offered to dispose of her. Under simple pretext: assuming they somehow manage her behaviour, Mika would be specimen of perfect success. In other words, even a failure at present could become corrected step by step, believed researchers.

entry.title: Episode 20. Pair of Subjects, Pair Little Sister.

link.title: Episode 20. Pair of Subjects, Pair Little Sister.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lydia and Rapha were drinking café au lait​ in the dining room; at that time Yuuyami came in.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.title: Episode 18. Dreaming Together.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Whereas Lydia waited for Yuuyami, she decided to adorn the dream world. At present, there is nothing in this world of the dream. Mere infinite space was spreading in every direction. Alike to iris dream, I had the other day. Pale-pink space the size of universe.

entry.title: Episode 17. Opposite the Darkness.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lydia and Rapha commenced working on a Dream Project.

entry.title: Episode 16. Dream Project.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: That night, Lydia couldn’t sleep a wink. The thoughts about Yuuyami were― not a reason.

entry.title: Episode 15. Because of That Love.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lydia plugged a Lightning Blade in the port upon right wrist of Yuuyami. The fastest wired interface created by humankind, how can be described Lightning Blade. As regarding wired information transmission exists no faster device than this. In prior of world’s collapse, was claimed that it should maintain top position for the following one hundred years. Via such Lightning Blade were connected Yuuyami and Ohan. Yuuyami’s right wrist to Ohan’s port on the left shoulder.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.title: Episode 13. Defective Yuuyami.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Yuuyami never dreams. Autodoll are not dream. Upon system abend, everything’s vanish. Bubbles as though. Fun days, happy moments, each and everything. However, consciousness of Yuuyami certainly was yet there. Yuuyami have no concept for where is ‘there’. Insubstantial, drifting, a very, very tiny consciousness that appeared from the darkness.
